name: Keystone — Content repurpose (1 long video → many posts, §4)

nodes.name: Manual / watch-folder: new long video
nodes.notes: Drop the founder's weekly 8-12 min counselling video path in as {{ $json.video }}.

nodes.name: faster-whisper (Bangla-tuned) → transcript
nodes.notes: Base Whisper Bangla WER ~25%+, so a Bangla-fine-tuned model + the human-QA gate below are mandatory.

parameters.subject: MANUAL QA: fix Bangla captions before publish
parameters.message: =Transcript ready at /tmp/transcript.json for {{ $json.video }}. Marina: correct the Bangla, then resume this workflow.

nodes.name: Human-QA gate (Marina fixes captions)
nodes.notes: HARD RULE: no auto-generated Bangla caption publishes without a human pass.

nodes.name: OpenShorts cut + per-platform captions (LLM)
nodes.notes: 3× 9:16 clips with burned Bangla subtitles + 1 FB caption + 1 WhatsApp status + hashtags.

nodes.name: Schedule via Postiz (MCP/API)
nodes.notes: Staggered across FB Page, Reels, YouTube Shorts via official APIs (no ban risk).
